---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for CTAFleet
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you are experiencing. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include details about the expected behavior and any relevant user interactions.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you have considered, and why they were not sufficient.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, screenshots, or references about the feature request here. If this relates to a specific module (fleet management, telematics, compliance, cost analytics, etc.), please mention it.
